content:
🚀 This revision integrates decision-making into the class structure while reinforcing XP progression, engagement-based unlockables, and layered learning experiences.

🎮 1. RPG System Finalization – Unlockables, Paths, & Cosmetic Rewards

📜 Students create a character in Week 1 and progressively unlock new customizations, skills, and in-class privileges.

🛡️ Character Unlockables by Week
• Week 1: Pick an archetype, tool, color, and defining personality trait.
• Week 3: Unlock a secondary skill (gains a new ability based on engagement style).
• Week 5: Earn a “Mount” (translates to an in-class perk like skipping a low-stakes assignment).
• Week 7: Gain a “Charm” (a magical “item” that grants a one-time academic bonus).
• Week 9: Option to respec and switch archetype if desired (must submit a reflective justification).
• Week 11: Unlock their “Final Form” (gains a custom title based on cumulative XP).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 47 (chunk 47/555)
